business.short_tagline: Web design, content structure, and steady site support for local businesses.

booking.booking_notice: Every project starts with a short discovery call so the next step is clear before any build work begins.

faq.question: Do you work with existing websites?
faq.answer_seed: Yes. Existing websites can be cleaned up, restructured, and improved without a full rebuild.

faq.question: Do you support WooCommerce shops?
faq.answer_seed: Yes. WooCommerce setup, cleanup, and launch support are available when product sales are part of the project.
